issues.summary: Implementation persists expression history in draw_history.json, but repo docs still forbid expression history there.
Expression history is only cleared by the all-history reset path, so reset semantics need explicit validation and documentation.

findings: Expression history now lives in draw_history.json as expression_pools with inverse-frequency weighting for multi-candidate categories and random templates. Unit tests cover weighting, migration, and pool isolation, but repo docs still say expression enhancement must not write to draw_history.json.
risk_points: History-schema migration rewrites legacy draw_history.json to version 2 on load.
Expression history reset is coupled to the global reset path rather than an expression-only reset.
Docs and code disagree on whether expression enhancement is allowed to persist history.
validation_focus: Weighted category selection from multi-candidate 具体表情.
Weighted random-template selection and specified-template history recording.
Legacy history upgrade to version 2 with expression_pools.
No mutation of item_pools or animal_pools during expression enhancement.

prior_session.takeaway: Previous work added multi-candidate parsing, separator handling, whole-group validation, and single-category final output; current scope extends that path with persisted weighting.
